title: Flag Frenzy
short_description: The World Flag Parade lost its labels! Match every flag to its country before it sulks off to lost-and-found.
description: The World Flag Parade is about to start and every flag has lost its country! Look at each flag and tap the right nation before the timer runs out — guess wrong and the flag sulks off to the lost-and-found bin. Younger players match famous, easy-to-spot flags like Japan and France; older players face tricky look-alikes (Ireland or Ivory Coast? Poland or Indonesia?) and reverse rounds where they must pick the flag from the country's name. A free online flags-of-the-world geography game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the country (or flag) that matches before the timer runs out.
